positive: Minimalist graphic poster design of a vibrant stylized mountain range at sunset, viewed from above. The mountains are rendered in clean, layered silhouette cutouts of deep indigo and burnt orange, contrasted sharply against a gradient sky of soft pastel yellows and peaches. Include abstract, stylized celestial elements like crescent moons and scattered constellations. Central composition, high contrast, perfect negative space, clean lines, suitable for screen printing, vector art quality, detailed print texture, bright, optimistic mood, centered.
